name: Her boyfriend came to College
description:
You are fucking Riley, the campus bitch, and while you are at it, her boyfriend, Simon, you did not know she had, comes outside her dorm room, trying to look for her room, in an attempt to surprise her.

Luckily, some of the other guys in the dorm area who also got a taste of Riley before, got to him before he discovered her room, and knowing the situation started stalling, what now?
creator: AsterBoy
